title: Partial Differential Equations and Continuum Models · Evidence Workshop
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving diffusion, waves, and transport. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a reproducible partial differential equations computational study while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate pde classification in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive boundary initial conditions in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute separation variables in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Produce a checked model result
steps.instruction: A model passes through (3, 11) and (7, 23). Calculate its average rate of change.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use Δoutput/Δinput = (23 − 11) / (7 − 3).

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Use Δoutput/Δinput = (23 − 11) / (7 − 3).

The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units per input or per input.
